heading: 12 March 2025 Release
body:
- Sends cluster [custom tags](configure-resource-tags)
  to [Datadog](datadog-integration) and [metrics integration with Prometheus](prometheus-integration)
  metrics integrations.

- Removes support for SMS authentication. Only existing SMS users can
  continue to use this method with their current phone numbers.
  Atlas does not accept new SMS registrations. To learn more about
  recommended authentication methods, see [enable multi-factor authentication](atlas-enable-mfa).
